chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 55 of 2013 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.8839/2017 (C/A) 10.10.2023 Mr. Shewak Ram Valecha, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mushtaque Ahmed Sanjrani, Secretary, Union Council 4-6, Shaikh Sheen Street, Sukkur is present and has filed compliance report along with certain documents, which is taken on record. He pleads inability to pay arrears amounting to Rs.4,51,292/-, outstanding on account of salary to the petitioner, but undertakes that from next month, Rs.50,000/- per month shall be paid to the petitioner till entire payment of Rs.4,51,292/- is paid to him. Petitioner and his Counsel are satisfied and contempt application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
